critical_need: Fastener thread size, head style (Torx vs Hex), washer type, and OEM installation torque (N·m).
engineering_consequence: Blocks procedural disassembly/assembly step generation and structural fastener modeling.
possible_sources: Workshop Manual Section 501-14 Front Door Window Regulator R&I torque table (SRC-CAND-000002)
OEM collision repair technical service sheets
Physical fastener extraction + pitch gauge / caliper measure
notes: Mission operator labeled this KG-002 — remapped to KG-005 because KG-002 is already Dana M300 rear axle housing wall thickness.
best_commercial_route: Acquire Motorcraft WSM Section 501-14 PDF bytes
best_physical_route: Extract one mounting fastener from physical reference vehicle and measure
